signatures: prelude intrinsic SharedCell<T: Plain> { new(move T) -> SharedCell<T>; withValue(#scoped (borrow T) -> R throws E effects ε) -> R throws E effects ε; replace(move T) -> T }
responsibility: sequentially consistent scoped observation and owner replacement for Plain payloads; observation cannot escape or suspend, replacement commits once and returns the old owner, and Plain implies no raw layout, lock-free, blocking-progress, or fairness property
notes: Current minimum stdlib profile; product support NOT_RUN

signature_records.text: prelude intrinsic SharedCell<T: Plain> { new(move T) -> SharedCell<T>; withValue(#scoped (borrow T) -> R throws E effects ε) -> R throws E effects ε; replace(move T) -> T }

signatures: prelude intrinsic SharedMutex<T> { new(move T) -> SharedMutex<T>; withLock(#scoped (inout T) -> R throws E effects ε) -> R throws E effects ε | {state} }
responsibility: receiver-bound non-reentrant scoped exclusive mutation; the closure cannot suspend or escape, unlock executes exactly once on every outcome and happens-before the next successful lock; no lifecycle payload, poisoning, fairness, or lock-order inference
notes: Current minimum stdlib profile; product support NOT_RUN

signature_records.text: prelude intrinsic SharedMutex<T> { new(move T) -> SharedMutex<T>; withLock(#scoped (inout T) -> R throws E effects ε) -> R throws E effects ε | {state} }

signatures: prelude intrinsic String: immutable Unicode scalar sequence
responsibility: immutable Unicode scalar sequence with one-based Char indexing
notes: The built-in logical domain is 1..scalarCount with offset index - 1; indexing never selects bytes, UTF-16 units, or graphemes.

signature_records.text: prelude intrinsic String: immutable Unicode scalar sequence
